title: Shopping Safely Online
drDigitalIntro:
Online shopping is convenient, but some sites are fake.
• Check for https:// and a padlock before buying.
• Look for reviews, and beware deals that seem too good to be true.
• Use a credit card for better fraud protection.

playgroundTask.goal: You learned to identify safe online shopping links

steps.say: Click 'Reveal URL' on 'Complete Your Purchase' to see where the link goes.
That's shop.example with https — mark it Safe.
Now reveal the URL for 'Enter Card Details'.
That URL uses a zero instead of 'o' in the domain — mark it Dangerous.

drDigitalSuccess: You know how to spot safe vs. dangerous shopping links! HTTPS + a known domain = safe to buy.
drDigitalHint: Click 'Reveal URL' to see a link's real URL, then decide if it's from a trustworthy site.
